title: Add domain proposal threshold trigger (Golden Test 18)
problem: ticket-019 completes ontology pressure proposals, but strict domain proposal gating is not yet implemented. Golden Test 18 requires domain proposals only when high thresholds are met.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 18: domain proposal requires strict thresholds.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic domain proposal generation only when golden thresholds are met without Ollama.
Proposal JSON proves thresholds and remains draft/candidate; no automatic domain activation.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
